# Eligibility criteria: age between 30 and 60 inclusive, employed or student, 
        # at least high school education, and years of abuse less than 10.
        return (30 <= self.age <= 60 and
                self.employment_status in ['employed', 'student'] and
                self.edducation in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
                self.years_of_abuse < 10)
